<!--
Thanks for the PR! A few quick checks before we can merge:
-->

## What & why
<!-- A sentence or two on the user-visible change and the reason. -->

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Docs / tooling only

## Checklist
- [ ] `npm test` passes locally (coverage gate is enforced — keep it ≥ 95%)
- [ ] `npm run build:lib` succeeds
- [ ] If user-facing: README / API table updated
- [ ] If new behavior: tests cover the happy path and at least one edge case
- [ ] If WCAG-relevant: I re-checked color contrast and target sizes

## Screenshots / demo
<!-- A short clip or screenshot helps reviewers a lot for UI changes. -->
